title: salix rotundifolia var. dodgeana
intro: Salix rotundifolia var. dodgeana, also known as Dodge's willow or round-leaved willow, is a variety of the willow plant that is native to North America. The bark and leaves of this plant contain salicin, a compound that has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix rotundifolia var. dodgeana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
